description_long: This is a solid, hexagonal dumbbell with two large, flat-faced end caps connected by a short, textured handle. The end caps are made of dark, metallic material with visible wear and scuff marks, giving it a rugged, used appearance. The handle is cylindrical and features a knurled texture for improved grip, and it is slightly lighter in color compared to the end caps. The hexagonal shape of the end caps prevents the dumbbell from rolling when placed on the ground, making it suitable for urban gym or park environments. There are no visible brand logos or weight markings on any surface. The overall construction appears robust and designed for repeated use in fitness or strength training activities.
description: A rugged, hexagonal dumbbell with dark metallic end caps and a knurled, lighter handle, showing signs of use and wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the hexagonal faces of both end caps stacked vertically, highlighting the flat surfaces and edges.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the dumbbell, with both hexagonal end caps and the textured handle clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the opposite hexagonal faces of the end caps.
description_view_3: Side view identical to view 1, showing the dumbbell's length and handle texture.
attribute_handle_type: Cylindrical, knurled steel handle with a round cross-section and textured grip.
attribute_end_cap_design: Hexagonal, flat-faced metallic end caps with slightly worn, matte surfaces and visible edge bevels.
attribute_condition: Used, with visible scuff marks, minor scratches, and some surface wear but structurally intact.
